title: Color coordinate rows permanently and apply to charts as well
excerpt: While the color conditioning is available, it does not permanently stay on your main board nor does it apply to charts. In order to make the charts and tables visually comprehensible, it’d be great if you can have each r…

posts.author: Airbear (Ariel Ofenlcoh)
posts.cookedHtml: While the color conditioning is available, it does not permanently stay on your main board nor does it apply to charts. In order to make the charts and tables visually comprehensible, it’d be great if you can have each row be it’s own color and when creating a chart, be able to change colors in pie charts, bar graphs, etc.
